steps.t: The three types of stone Rísti Graver seeks can be found in Máttugard. You should collect copper, marble, and amethyst for Rísti Graver.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should repair the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Graver's supervision.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should repair the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Graver's supervision.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should repair the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Graver's supervision.
Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
